What we build

Three ways to get the home that fits your life

Whatever stage you're at — a bare block, a tired old house, or a subdivision — there's a clear path forward. Here's where most people start.

New Custom Homes

A home designed around how you actually live — your block, your budget, your finishes. No copy-paste floor plans.

Talk to us about a new build →

Knockdown & Rebuild

Love your street but not your house? Keep the location you already know and rebuild something modern in its place.

Ask about a rebuild →

Townhouses & Multi Units

Developing a block? We build multi-unit and townhouse projects that stack up on paper and stand out on the street.

Discuss a development →

Recent work

Real homes. Real Melbourne streets.

Every photo below is a home we actually built — not a render, not a stock photo. This is the standard you can expect on your own block.

The journey

You'll always know exactly where things stand

The biggest fear in building is the unknown. So here's the whole thing, start to finish — no surprises, no jargon.

  1. 01

    Consultation

    We sit down, understand your block, your budget and your must-haves, and tell you honestly what's possible. No pressure, no cost.

  2. 02

    Design

    We shape a design that fits your life and your land — and walk you through finishes at our Lynbrook display office so you can see and touch them.

  3. 03

    Build

    A licensed team gets to work, with clear stages and a real person you can call. You see progress, not silence.

  4. 04

    Handover

    We hand over the keys to a home that's finished properly — and we're still here afterwards if you need us.

Good questions

The things people ask us first

What areas of Melbourne do you build in?

We build custom homes, knockdown rebuilds and townhouses across Melbourne, with a display office in Lynbrook servicing the south-east and surrounding suburbs. Not sure if we cover your block? Ask us — the answer is usually yes.

Are you a licensed builder?

Yes. Alina Homes is a registered building practitioner, builder's licence CDB-U 51515, with more than 10 years building in Melbourne.

Do you do knockdown rebuilds?

Absolutely — it's one of the things we do most. Keep the street and location you already love, and we'll rebuild a modern home in its place.

How do I get a quote?

Request a free, no-obligation consultation using the form below, or call 0430 830 790. We'll get back to you within one business day.

No obligation, no cost

Let's talk about your build

Tell us a little about your project. We'll get back to you within one business day with honest, useful next steps — whether or not you build with us.

  • A real conversation with a licensed builder
  • Straight answers on budget and timeline
  • Visit our Lynbrook display office when you're ready
